context7.description: Live docs for 7000+ libraries. Use before any install or when working with a library API. Essential for FastAPI, LangGraph, Playwright, FAISS, Ollama documentation.

sequential-thinking.description: Structured step-by-step reasoning for complex problems. Use for architecture decisions, debugging, agent orchestration planning, and pipeline flow design.

playwright.description: Browser automation - scraping, E2E testing, form filling, screenshots. No API key needed. Used by Crawler_Agent for ByteByteGo navigation.

memory.description: Persistent memory across sessions via knowledge graph. Store project context, agent decisions, pipeline execution history, and architectural decisions.

filesystem.description: File system access for BlogAgent project directory. Enables reading and writing project files outside workspace.

duckduckgo.description: Web search with no API key required. Use for research, finding current info about FastAPI, LangGraph, FAISS, Ollama updates.

fetch.description: Fetch any URL and convert to markdown. Free, no API key. Use for reading docs, web pages, ByteByteGo content analysis.

github.description: GitHub repos, PRs, issues, commits. Requires PAT - set GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN to enable. Useful for LangGraph, FastAPI, Playwright issue tracking.

docker.description: Build/run/inspect Docker containers. Enable when containerizing BlogAgent for deployment.

postgres.description: Natural language SQL against PostgreSQL. Update connection string before enabling. Alternative to FAISS for vector storage with pgvector.

sqlite.description: SQLite database access. Update --db-path before enabling. Useful for metadata storage alongside FAISS.
